title: Minecraft TB Modpack by Foxi
description: 1.20.1 | The Best modpack ever. TB means "The Best". | Minecraft TB Modpack by Foxi
body:
# **Minecraft TB Modpack by Foxi**

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f25caaffbd78068498c0ef51fdc6406c7d1e68ac.jpeg)


This modpack is designed to enhance the vanilla Minecraft gameplay experience by adding a variety of new features and mechanics. **These include:**

🔘 **New biomes and structures:** Explore new and unique biomes, each with its own distinct terrain, resources, and challenges. Discover hidden structures and ruins scattered throughout the world, thanks to the _Terralith_ and other mods like _ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village_.

🔘 **Improved combat:** Experience a more dynamic and engaging combat system with new weapons, armor, and abilities. Fight against a wider variety of enemies, each with their own unique strengths and weaknesses.

🔘 **Expanded crafting and building:** Craft new items, blocks, and structures with a wider range of materials and recipes. Build more elaborate and creative structures with new decorative blocks and furniture.

🔘 **Enhanced exploration:** Discover new ways to explore the world with new vehicles, gadgets, and abilities. Delve into deep caves, soar through the skies, and traverse treacherous terrain with ease.

🔘 **Improved performance:** Enjoy a smoother and more stable gaming experience with performance optimizations and bug fixes. Experience less lag and fewer crashes, allowing you to focus on the fun without distractions.

🔘 **Share your worlds and play with your friends:** Thanks to _Essentials_ mod you can share world and play with your friends without hosting a server. Mod olso allows to customize your sikn with cosmetics.

🔘 **Over 200 mods:** This modpack includes over 200 mods that will make gameplay more enjoyable.

**_What are you waiting for? Download and play this modpack now!_**
